item.title: The Dark Arts
item.description:
Luis Ricardo Falero, "Witches going to their Sabbath" (1878)
Lev Lerch, "Will o' the Wisp" (1890)
Daniele Valeriani, "Il Mago, la Morte e Il Diavolo" - dettaglio - (2016)
Leanna TenEycke, "Harpy"
Harry O. Morris, "The Dreams in the Witch House" (1972)
Werner Wilhelm Gustav Schuch, "The Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse" (1910 ca.)
Salvador Dalí, "The Horseman of Death" (1935 ca.)
Henry Weston Keen, "Skull Crowned with Snakes and Flowers" (1930)
Gustave Doré, “Paradise Lost“ (1866)
Gustave Doré, Illustration for Edgar Allan Poe's : "The Raven" (1883)
Ferdinand Staeger, "Makabere Friedhofsszene einer Winternacht" (1930-1939 Ca.)
Frederick Simpson Coburn, "Plague Arriving" (1909)
Edward Robert Hughes, "Dream Idyll, a Valkyrie" (1902)
Gustave Doré, "The Vision of the Valley of Dry Bones" (1880)
Gustave Doré, "Paradise Lost, The Winged Heralds of Hell" (1866)
Georges Achille-Fould, "Madame Satan Seduction" (1904)
Welder Wings, “Mysteries of Water”.
Frederick Coburn, "The Girl and Death" (1902 ca.)
Mario De Maria, "The Pupil" (1886)
Johan Braakensiek, "The Half Moon" (1908)
Arthur Wasse, "Through the window" (1926)

item.dc:creator: FullAccessPass

item.title: Three years maintaining 55ish-pound weight loss
item.description:
I can almost bench press my weight, and I do 3x8 at 110 on triceps extension now.
I haven't been a size 4 since high school.
My starting point. Losing it was hard AF but maintaining not so bad, especially since I absolutely love veggies now!
item.dc:creator: amb1021

item.title: Illness
item.description: Been waiting to post this dump for a very long time, but it's finally time. Losing my job over my illness, and just no idea what to do with life or how to maintain finances/insurance. I need a purpose. The systems in our society has no real support for this. Pain, and more pain. Sometimes it's too much. I used to travel the world, now I can't leave the house. It helps to vent. Shoutout to @mooyoutoo2 @atalantaa @thatpug @jessag87 I hope you are well.
item.dc:creator: Cobalt1

item.title: Unions work!
item.description: With so much news happening right now, thought I'd share something hopeful. I work at a nonprofit of about 250 people. Our team director has been problematic from the start - she was in way over her head and constantly used slights and subtle insults to assert her authority. She would find your weakness and squeeze. After many months of growing frustrations, a group of managers complained to HR and they did nothing. Several individuals complained separately, and they did nothing. My teammates resigned without jobs lined up, and they did nothing. In fact, she was promoted and given more staff. Finally, those of us in the union went to HR with our union rep and demanded that she be fired. Out of four complaints filed, three were found to be "unsubstantiated," likely because there was insufficient evidence. While we waited on the fourth, the union published a statement with 60 signatures and shared it with our board and the exec team. This was yesterday afternoon. Today, about 24 hours later, our exec held a meeting and shared: "Today is xxxx's last day at [this organization]." The air literally feels lighter. Years of terrible management, put downs, disrespect are finally over. Unions work. It felt strange being part of one but wow - it really works. This took a serious toll on my team's mental health and we're looking forward to a lot of healing. Thank you for hearing my rant! The power of a collective really makes a difference. (originally posted by @cardam0m on 2023-10-13 06:46:10)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Now we know who taught them 1st
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: After 4 years of work I finally signed a publisher for my nostalgic helicopter game! (Cleared Hot)
item.description: Hi Imgur, 4 years ago I started posting prototype gifs here to get feedback. After way more work than I expected, I finally signed a publisher for my first game (Cleared Hot). The publisher is MicroProse. They’ve published games like Civilization, Xcom, and Falcon 4.0, and recently have been publishing a lot of flight + action games. Signing with Microprose completes a story that started 25 years ago, when my mom bought me Falcon 4.0 and a joystick that BestBuy had mistakenly priced at $20. To be partnering with Microprose now, feels pretty crazy. Thanks Imgur for your feedback on gifs along the way!
item.dc:creator: iamcfinger

item.title: Beats the alternative I guess
item.description: It’s hard to fathom how old i’ve gotten. I usually don’t really care about it but numbers like 65 are more jarring. EDIT: Wow Most Viral. I’m mostly a lurker/commenter but i guess this post’s subject is universal. Cheers fellow weirdos, young and old.

The Earth is a fish
This exudes chaos
oh my
Boys and Girls can all go AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
cats aren't backstabbers, they are FRONT STABBERS
This is what a taxi looks like if you drop acid.
oh no
>:3
I remember when we had a Blizzard and the Union Canal froze over and some cunts tried to drive along it and their car fell through the ice.
:D
why is pomni on the floor? :(
He is, don't deny it.
Run
sound on
w o m e n

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: In case any of you are looking for answers, look into it
item.description: Ever since I got Covid, I always felt like my lungs were heavier than usual, and it took more energy to breathe. I was also filled to the brim with mucus (TMI I know). I thought I would live forever like this until I finally saw an allergist. Now I am on prescription antihistamines** and feel 99% like I did before. I hope my journey provides some hope for someone else. **EDIT: for those of you asking, I’m on Cromolyn - I googled it and I was incorrect in calling it an antihistamine, it’s actually a mast cell stabilizer that has a downstream effect of reducing histamine release.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: 11/? Mayor from Powerpuff Girls
item.description: “Thanks to you girls, Townsville is safe!” 11/?? Mayor from Powerpuff Girls I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD
item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: Halloween joke
item.description: I saw this in a post here and made my own. I took a picture of my office area and used an AI to replace an office door with a staircase. Hung it up within view of my desk and watched as people found it. Lots of speculation as to who made it. Thanks Imgur for a fun prank!

item.title: Reminder: Fix your PayPal settings by November 27!
item.description: PayPal is going to use your information for marketing if you don't opt out by November 27. To fix it, go to your profile settings, then data and privacy, then personalized shopping, and deselect.
item.dc:creator: timichanga

item.title: "My friend and I are weird and send each other weird things" dump #123
item.description:
Tis indeed!
'sup, foolish mortals?
Wait, we can get fined for that now too? There go my weekend plans.
What kinda bills do you pay to be slamming doors in my house?!
To be honest, I thought that at the time too for a split second.
That's just bloody rude.
Please don't make me.
Hate it when that happens.
Seriously, please don't make me.
......5?!?!
Gotta stay hydrated while being spooky, kids.
